content:
The scene shows Arjun, a young boy, playing with a group of kids in a playground. He seems out of place until Anjali, a girl, notices him and introduces herself. They start playing together and become close friends. The scene then cuts to Arjun's present day, where he is smiling and looking at a photo of him and Anjali.

The story then jumps back to Arjun's childhood, where he and Anjali are inseparable. They share KitKats, do homework together, and have a birthday party. Arjun's mother takes a photo of them together.

The scene then cuts to Arjun's present day again, where he is looking at a box of memories from his childhood. He is smiling and nostalgic, remembering his time with Anjali.

The episode ends with Arjun's present day, where he is standing in his apartment, looking confused and disappointed. He is holding a bouquet of flowers and seems to be expecting a reunion with Anjali, but she walks away, leaving him hanging. The episode ends with Arjun's voiceover, wondering if he will ever see Anjali again.
